rows.label: qev013102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Who're you? I've already
decided to live quietly without
interacting with anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0002
rows.name:
If you don't have business,
get lost. If you have something
to say, make it quick...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev013102_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about the Celeste Three.

rows.label: qev013102_JNK0020
rows.name: Press

rows.label: qev013102_SEL0021
rows.name:
Mention Fosdyke's name and ask
for Briggs's whereabouts.

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Well now. I have
absolutely nothing to say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0004
rows.name:
Fosdyke... ...I've heard the name
somewhere, but I have absolutely no
memory of what kind of guy he is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0005
rows.name:
So you brought that with you... Fosdyke
placed his bets on you, huh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0006
rows.name:
...You heard that I'm suspicious,
right? I can't entrust my life
to you when we've just met.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0007
rows.name: So... Let me test your strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0008
rows.name:
I want you to defeat 5 Sea Pugles. If
you can't beat them, there's no way you'll
be a match for that bastard Briggs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0009
rows.name:
Is this the time to be dawdling here?
Hurry up and defeat 5 Sea Pugles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0010
rows.name:
Otherwise, I won't cooperate with
you or Fosdyke. Trust is everything
in these matters. Trust.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0011
rows.name:
You defeated the Sea Pugles?
I see... You might actually
be able to defeat him...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0012
rows.name:
Understood... I'll tell you
everything. You've heard the
truth from Fosdyke, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev013102_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod that you have heard it.

rows.label: qev013102_JNK0040
rows.name: Evade

rows.label: qev013102_SEL0041
rows.name: Say that your memory is unclear.

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0013
rows.name: Good memory. That saves me some trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0014
rows.name:
Now then, about Briggs... He's currently
hiding deep inside the Molten Hollow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0015
rows.name:
It's the story of a villain
named Briggs who stole the
White Gold and hid somewhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0016
rows.name:
Fosdyke and I had no choice but to
cooperate in order to survive, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0017
rows.name:
We got nothing in return and went
through hell, so we want to bring
Briggs to justice... Remember now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Alright, let's get down to business.
About Briggs... He's currently hiding
deep inside the Molten Hollow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0019
rows.name:
You're wondering why in a place
like that? Well... he built a
massive safe inside that cave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0020
rows.name:
To ensure he doesn't hand the White Gold
over to anyone... Truly, he's a man who
will do anything for his own desires...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0021
rows.name:
Thanks to his greed... both Fosdyke and
I had our lives completely ruined.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Please, stop him. If you can make that
happen, I'm ready at any time to atone
for the sin of killing my comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0023
rows.name:
Briggs plays dirty, so be
careful. There's no need to
face him with foolish honesty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013102_MSG0024
rows.name:
You can lie to him, just make sure
you don't let him deceive you.[ST:wait ]
